CustomField.formula: BLANKVALUE(IF( leaseworks__Onetime_Event_Due_Date__c < TODAY(), -(TODAY()- leaseworks__Onetime_Event_Due_Date__c), leaseworks__Onetime_Event_Due_Date__c - TODAY()) , IF( leaseworks__Next_Event_Due_Date__c < TODAY(), -(TODAY()- leaseworks__Next_Event_Due_Date__c), leaseworks__Next_Event_Due_Date__c - TODAY()) )
CustomField.label: Remaining Days
